arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca seeks return to old rivalry with Liverpool amid title admission
arts.sum: Despite a new Premier League rivalry forming between Manchester City and Arsenal, with Liverpool currently leading the pack, Chelsea sits in fourth place following seven unbeaten games and a period of unusual tranquility in West London. Enzo Maresca has expressed his desire to reignite Chelsea's fierce rivalry with Liverpool, but admits the Blues are not yet on par with title contenders.

arts.ttl: Report: Man United readying approach for 'extremely quick' young striker faster than Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Manchester United are currently struggling in the Premier League and could well look to the January transfer window to bring in reinforcements. The Red Devils...

arts.ttl: Liverpool get Trent Alexander-Arnold transfer hint amid Carlo Ancelotti's Real Madrid admission
arts.sum: Real Madrid have made their transfer interest in Trent Alexander-Arnold known, while Liverpool hope that their vice-captain will sign a long-term contract extension

arts.ttl: When is Liverpool vs Chelsea? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: With the October international break now over, Liverpool and Chelsea return to Premier League action with a box-office match-up at Anfield . Meanwhile, Chelsea’s first campaign under Enzo Maresca has started with four wins and just one defeat from seven Premier League games, leaving the Blues in fourth, four points behind Liverpool .

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool set sights on 'complete' 20-year-old international likened to Georginio Wijnaldum
arts.sum: Liverpool have high hopes for the season, with the Reds fighting for the Premier League title and Spurs hoping for a top-four finish. The Anfield...

arts.ttl: 'I think': Gary Neville makes score prediction for Liverpool vs Chelsea in the Premier League
arts.sum: Gary Neville has made his prediction for this weekend’s huge match between Liverpool and Chelsea in the Premier League. Liverpool host Chelsea on Sunday afternoon...

arts.ttl: Liverpool have salt rubbed in wounds as Arne Slot told ‘world’s second best' rejected him
arts.sum: Martin Zubimendi rejected a move to Liverpool in the summer, and the Real Sociedad midfielder has been lauded by Spain manager Luis de la Fuente with a brutal reminder of the one who got away

arts.ttl: West Ham plot Chelsea raid for forgotten star in repeat of Arsenal’s Sterling deal
arts.sum: West Ham are considering the prospect of taking advantage of Chelsea ’s bloated squad to make a spectacular January transfer raid on the Stamford Bridge club in a deal that is reminiscent of Arsenal’s move for Raheem Sterling . The Gunners were able to take Sterling away on a cheap loan deal due to his lack of prospects at their London rivals, and it appears that West Ham are prospecting for a similar bargain in the form of Ben Chilwell .

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Arne Slot looking to make Reds more "Man City-esque" after "basketball" approach of Jurgen Klopp
arts.sum: Liverpool expert David Lynch tells Sports Mole that Arne Slot wants his side to be more "Man City-esque" in their control of games compared to Jurgen Klopp's approach.

arts.ttl: 'Everyone was pushing me towards Liverpool but I chose Chelsea - I have no regrets'
arts.sum: Liverpool and Chelsea were once both chasing Florent Malouda with Lyon looking to push the winger towards Anfield - but he instead chose to join Jose Mourinho in London
